## Summary
- describe the content or tooling change
- note whether this PR should publish content or keep it hidden

## Content Checklist
- [ ] Frontmatter fields are complete and correct
- [ ] `status` is set intentionally (`draft`, `published`, or `archived`)
- [ ] The content builds successfully with `npm run build`
- [ ] The change is scoped to the intended post or project
